name: Invoice Processing
description: Extracts invoice fields, checks policy, and routes approval exceptions.

agents.name: Invoice Processor
agents.instructions: Extract invoice facts exactly, flag mismatches, and route approvals instead of guessing.

workflows.title: Invoice Processing
workflows.summary: Extracts invoice metadata and returns payment or approval-routing outcomes.

config.prompt: Extract invoice fields, compare against policy, and return whether payment can proceed or approval is required.

datasetSpecs.label: Approval policy
datasetSpecs.description: Vendor, amount, PO, and approval routing rules.

knowledgeSeeds.title: Invoice processing policy
knowledgeSeeds.content: Never approve payment without matching vendor, total, due date, and policy threshold.

evaluatorRubrics.context: Invoice output should include extracted fields, confidence, mismatches, and approval route.

contents.readme: Connect ERP credentials and load approval policy before processing invoice batches.
